platform_notes: Kofile BrowserView Angular SPA. REST API at /browserview/api/search. freeAccessWithoutLogin=0 — PAID SUBSCRIPTION required via New Vision Systems (https://srvtesting.newvisionsystems.com/SubscriptionWeb/). No anonymous search access. encryptData=0 (no RSA encryption). Authentication: JWT token from /api/account/checktoken POST.
deferred_reason: Subscription required. User must purchase access at https://srvtesting.newvisionsystems.com/SubscriptionWeb/Account/Register. Once credentials available, build kofile_browserview adapter using /api/search POST with JWT token.
probe_notes: Probed 2026-06-18. OfficialRecords.OsceolaClerk.org/browserview/api/search/clientinfo returns 200 confirming Kofile BrowserView platform. freeAccessWithoutLogin=0 blocks all search. Subscription backend at newvisionsystems.com/SubscriptionWeb. Angular AngularJS SPA with agGrid. Reachable from datacenter (no CF/Akamai) but gated by paid subscription.
